results.title: Former BBNaija housemates credit show for launching careers
results.description: Big Brother Naija’s evolution from a reality show into a platform for creativity, entrepreneurship and career growth took centre stage at the Media Launch for season 11 on Wednesday, 15 July 2026. Former housemates Uriel, Doyin, Kola and DJ Flo reflected on how the show helped shape their careers while sharing the lessons they have learnt navigating life after reality television. The post Former BBNaija housemates credit show for launching careers appeared first on The Sun Nigeria .
